Modules¶

grobidClient.py¶

Processes PDF files using Grobid and generates TEI XML files.

wordCloud.py¶

Extracts abstract text and generates a word cloud.

countFigures.py¶

Counts the number of figures in each paper.

extract_links.py¶

Extracts external links from the XML files.

AI Research Paper Analysis
